message:
fix(term,core): harden NotNan panic and overlap boundary check

- performer.rs: replace NotNan::new().unwrap() with unwrap_or_default()
  in iTerm ReportCellSize handler. While physical_cols/rows are
  guaranteed ≥1 from Screen::new, defensive coding prevents panic if
  invariant is ever violated. Also guard divisor with .max(1) and use
  .ok() for scale NotNan.

- ingest.rs: add explicit overlap_len > current.len() check before
  is_char_boundary() in delta extraction. While is_char_boundary()
  returns false for out-of-range indices, the explicit check makes
  the bounds contract clear and prevents any future regression.

Validated: 254 term + core compile clean via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
